Class ReloadingComponent

java.lang.Object
lucis.lux.hff.components.ReloadingComponent
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore>, Cloneable
public class ReloadingComponent extends Object implements com.hypixel.hytale.component.Component<com.hypixel.hytale.server.core.universe.world.storage.EntityStore>
The ReloadingComponent class is a component that represents the reloading state of a firearm. This component is used to track whether a firearm is currently in the process of reloading.

This component is typically used in conjunction with the ReloadSystem to manage the reloading process of firearms in the HFF (Hytale Firearm Framework) plugin.

Example usage:

    ReloadingComponent reloadingComponent = new ReloadingComponent();
    reloadingComponent.setReloading(true);
    boolean isReloading = reloadingComponent.isReloading();

    • isReloading

      public boolean isReloading()
      Returns whether the firearm is currently reloading.
      Returns:
      true if the firearm is reloading, false otherwise.
